name: RPC6
notes: Retroid Pocket Classic 6, Snapdragon G1 Gen2 (parrot), GammaOS Next Android 14 GSI reference device.

name: RG476H
notes: Anbernic RG476H, Unisoc ums9620 (ums9620_2h10), GammaOS Lite Android 14. GPU via devfreq (23140000.gpu), fan via hwmon0 pwm-fan (pwm1 duty cycle, no RPM reporting).

name: Odin2EX
notes: AYN Odin 2 EX, Qualcomm QCS8550 (kalama, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 class -- ties Retroid Nova as joint highest-end device in the fleet, per docs/coverage-gaps-research.md section 7). Android 13, stock AYN firmware. Confirmed via adb getprop 2026-07-12: ro.product.model=Odin2EX, ro.product.manufacturer=AYN, ro.soc.model=QCS8550. GPU via kgsl-3d0/gpu_busy_percentage (Adreno, same path as other Qualcomm devices), battery via power_supply/battery/capacity -- both confirmed live. Primary target device for the new-emulator todos (Saturn/RetroArch Beetle, Vita3K, Switch/Eden, Xbox 360, PS3) that require SD 8 Gen 2-class hardware.
